name: research_brief
description: Research a topic via multiple web searches, fetch a key page, summarize into a document and notification

steps.description: From the three web_search result sets, pick the single most useful URL for deeper reading on {topic} (angle: {angle}). Then use fetch_page on that URL. If none are useful, note why and continue with snippets only.
Write a concise research brief on {topic} (focus: {angle}) using the search results and any fetched page. Structure: executive summary, key findings, caveats, open questions, sources (titles + URLs).
Persist the research brief as a document for the user

args.title: Research brief: {topic}
args.body: Replace this body with the full research brief from the previous step.
